title: mentha austriaca var. pulchella
intro: Mentha austriaca var. pulchella, also known as Austrian mint or mountain mint, is a subspecies of mint native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of menthol and other essential oils. The health benefits of Mentha austriaca var. pulchella include its ability to soothe digestive issues, alleviate headaches and fever, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties that can combat infections. Mentha austriaca var. pulchella is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
